title: Create a timeline/Gantt chart by status changes

posts.author: ricardo.hochman (Ricardo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I would love if Monday.com had a timeline/Gantt chart that shows the item and how many days it’s took in each column, based on the status changed history, something like that:

Captura de Tela 2024-08-09 às 12.17.022266×674 71.4 KB

Could you put this in the backlog? It would help us in our project management a lot! Thanks
